steps.title: Search Sector Alpha
steps.text: A weak emergency beacon has been detected. Move toward the first signal source.
steps.correctLore: Sector Alpha confirmed. The signal is still active.

steps.title: Search Sector Bravo
steps.text: The signal has shifted. Continue tracking.
steps.correctLore: Sector Bravo confirmed. The beacon is getting stronger.

steps.title: Final Signal Lock
steps.text: Multiple readings are now available. Use all available telemetry to locate the source.
steps.correctLore: Final lock acquired. The missing hiker is nearby.
